discussion.content: Three core services (checkout, payment, order) are experiencing elevated error rates, with checkout-service peaking at ~19.6% errors. All exceed the alert threshold of 5% and together affect multiple services, indicating a systemic issue.
Correlate these spikes with recent deployments (query index=deploy_events) and check infrastructure metrics (CPU/memory) for the hosts running these services to identify a common root cause.

timeline: [Triage] Three core services (checkout, payment, order) are experiencing elevated error rates, with checkout-service peaking at ~19.6% errors. All exceed the alert threshold of 5% and together affect multiple services, indicating a systemic issue. — severity: SEV-2
